mapper.sql: FROM PUBLIC_FACILITY PF JOIN FACILITY F ON F.FACILITY_NO = PF.FACILITY_NO LEFT JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = F.DONG_NO AND AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = F.APT_CMPLEX_NO LEFT JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO LEFT JOIN COMMON_CODE CC ON CC.CODE_NO_CD = F.FACILITY_TY_CD AND CC.USE_YN = 'Y'

PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO, PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO, PF.FACILITY_NO, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM, PF.CMN_FACILITY_CN, PF.CMN_FACILITY_AMT, PF.CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN, PF.CMN_FACILITY_OPR_HR, TO_CHAR(PF.REG_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') REG_DT, TO_CHAR(PF.MDF_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') MDF_DT, F.FACILITY_TY_CD, NVL(CC.CODE_NAME, F.FACILITY_TY_CD) FACILITY_TY_NM, F.DONG_NO, AU.DONG_NM, F.LOC_CN, PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO, PI.ITEM_NM, PI.CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD
mapper.select: SELECT APT_CMPLEX_NO FROM MGMT_OFFICE WHERE MGMT_OFC_NO = #{mgmtOfcNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

/* * 로그인 입주민의 현재 거주 단지 조회 * * ROWNUM만 사용하면 여러 세대가 있을 때 임의 단지가 잡힐 수 있습니다. * 그래서 현재 거주 중인 세대 중 세대주 여부, 입주일 기준으로 1건만 선택합니다. */ SELECT APT_CMPLEX_NO FROM ( SELECT AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO FROM HSHLD_HEAD HH JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = HH.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO WHERE HH.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND NVL(HH.INOUT_CD, 'IN') != 'OUT' ORDER BY CASE WHEN HH.HEAD_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, HH.MOVE_IN_DT DESC NULLS LAST, HH.HO_NO ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT 'RSV' || LPAD(SEQ_FACILITY_HSTRY.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') FROM DUAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO, PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO )
mapper.sql:
FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO JOIN FACILITY F ON F.FACILITY_NO = PF.FACILITY_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON M.USER_NO = FH.USER_NO
/* * 예약자 세대정보는 사용자당 1건만 선택합니다. * 왜? 한 사용자가 여러 호/여러 단지에 연결되어 있으면 JOIN 결과가 중복되기 때문입니다. */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT HH.USER_NO, HH.HO_NO, AD.HO, AU.DONG_NO, AU.DONG_NM, AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY HH.USER_NO, AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO ORDER BY CASE WHEN HH.HEAD_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, HH.MOVE_IN_DT DESC NULLS LAST, HH.HO_NO ) AS RN FROM HSHLD_HEAD HH JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = HH.HO_NO JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO WHERE NVL(HH.INOUT_CD, 'IN') != 'OUT' ) WHERE RN = 1 ) RHH ON RHH.USER_NO = FH.USER_NO AND RHH.APT_CMPLEX_NO = PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO

FH.RSVT_NO, FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO, PF.FACILITY_NO, PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO, FH.USER_NO, M.USER_ID, M.USER_NM, RHH.HO_NO, RHH.HO, RHH.DONG_NO, RHH.DONG_NM, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM, PI.ITEM_NM, F.FACILITY_TY_CD, F.LOC_CN, PI.CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD, TO_CHAR(FH.RSVT_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') RSVT_DT, TO_CHAR(FH.RSVT_BGNG_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') RSVT_BGNG_DTTM, TO_CHAR(FH.RSVT_END_DTTM, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') RSVT_END_DTTM, FH.RSVT_STTS_CD, DECODE( FH.RSVT_STTS_CD, 'PENDING','승인대기', 'APPROVED','승인완료', 'REJECTED','승인거절', 'CANCELLED','승인취소', 'EXPIRED','승인만료', FH.RSVT_STTS_CD ) RSVT_STTS_NM, FH.USE_PRPS_CN, FH.USE_PRSN_CNT, FH.RJCT_RSN_CN, CASE WHEN FH.RSVT_STTS_CD = 'APPROVED' AND FH.REG_DT = FH.MDF_DT THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AUTO_APPROVE_YN, TO_CHAR(FH.REG_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') REG_DT, TO_CHAR(FH.MDF_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') MDF_DT
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AND FH.RSVT_STTS_CD = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO, PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO AND PF.CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN = 'Y' AND NVL(PI.CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD, 'OPEN') = 'OPEN')
SELECT COUNT(*) AND FH.USER_NO = #{userNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_HSTRY WHERE CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = #{cmnFacilityItemNo} AND RSVT_STTS_CD IN ('PENDING','APPROVED') AND RSVT_BGNG_DTTM < TO_DATE(#{rsvtEndDttm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AND RSVT_END_DTTM > TO_DATE(#{rsvtBgngDttm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FACILITY_CHECK_HSTRY FCH JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.FACILITY_NO = FCH.FACILITY_NO JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = #{cmnFacilityItemNo} AND NVL(FCH.USE_RESTRICT_YN, 'N') = 'Y' AND FCH.USE_RESTRICT_BGNG_DT IS NOT NULL AND FCH.USE_RESTRICT_END_DT IS NOT NULL AND FCH.USE_RESTRICT_BGNG_DT < TO_DATE(#{rsvtEndDttm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AND FCH.USE_RESTRICT_END_DT > TO_DATE(#{rsvtBgngDttm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')

SELECT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO, PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM, PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO, PI.ITEM_NM, PI.CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD FROM PUBLIC_ITEM PI JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = #{cmnFacilityItemNo} AND PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo}

SELECT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO , PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO , PF.FACILITY_NO , PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM , PF.CMN_FACILITY_CN , PF.CMN_FACILITY_AMT , PF.CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN , PF.CMN_FACILITY_OPR_HR , F.FACILITY_TY_CD , F.DONG_NO , AU.DONG_NM , F.LOC_CN , PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO , PI.ITEM_NM , NVL(PI.CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD, 'OPEN') AS CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD , 'N' AS RESERVED_YN FROM PUBLIC_FACILITY PF JOIN FACILITY F ON F.FACILITY_NO = PF.FACILITY_NO LEFT JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = F.DONG_NO AND AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = F.APT_CMPLEX_NO JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = #{searchCmnFacilityNo} AND PF.CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN = 'Y' AND F.USE_YN = 'Y' /* * OPEN, USE, REPAIR 모두 조회해야 화면에서 비활성화 처리가 가능함. */ AND NVL(PI.CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD, 'OPEN') IN ('OPEN', 'USE', 'REPAIR') ORDER BY PI.ITEM_NM

SELECT FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = #{searchCmnFacilityNo} AND FH.RSVT_STTS_CD IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') AND FH.RSVT_BGNG_DTTM < TO_DATE(#{rsvtEndDttm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AND FH.RSVT_END_DTTM > TO_DATE(#{rsvtBgngDttm}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')

SELECT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO, PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO, PF.FACILITY_NO, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM, PF.CMN_FACILITY_CN, PF.CMN_FACILITY_AMT, PF.CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN, PF.CMN_FACILITY_OPR_HR, F.FACILITY_TY_CD, F.DONG_NO, AU.DONG_NM, F.LOC_CN, COUNT(PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO) AS USE_PRSN_CNT FROM PUBLIC_FACILITY PF JOIN FACILITY F ON F.FACILITY_NO = PF.FACILITY_NO LEFT JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = F.DONG_NO AND AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = F.APT_CMPLEX_NO LEFT JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO AND NVL(PI.CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD, 'OPEN') = 'OPEN' WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND PF.CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN = 'Y' AND F.USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO, PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO, PF.FACILITY_NO, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM, PF.CMN_FACILITY_CN, PF.CMN_FACILITY_AMT, PF.CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN, PF.CMN_FACILITY_OPR_HR, F.FACILITY_TY_CD, F.DONG_NO, AU.DONG_NM, F.LOC_CN ORDER BY F.DONG_NO, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM
mapper.update: UPDATE PUBLIC_ITEM SET CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD = 'USE' WHERE CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = ( SELECT CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO FROM FACILITY_HSTRY WHERE RSVT_NO = #{rsvtNo} )

UPDATE PUBLIC_ITEM PI SET PI.CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD = 'OPEN' WHERE PI.CMN_FACILITY_STTS_CD IN ('USE', 'REPAIR') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH WHERE FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO AND FH.RSVT_STTS_CD IN ('PENDING', 'APPROVED') AND FH.RSVT_END_DTTM > SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM FROM PUBLIC_FACILITY PF WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND PF.CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM

SELECT DISTINCT PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO, PI.ITEM_NM FROM PUBLIC_ITEM PI JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND PF.CMN_FACILITY_RSV_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PI.ITEM_NM
mapper.update: UPDATE FACILITY_HSTRY SET RSVT_STTS_CD = 'EXPIRED', RJCT_RSN_CN = '관리자 승인 가능 시간이 초과되어 자동 취소되었습니다', MDF_DT = SYSDATE WHERE RSVT_STTS_CD = 'PENDING' AND RSVT_BGNG_DTTM <= SYSDATE AND CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO IN ( SELECT PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO FROM PUBLIC_ITEM PI JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT FH.RSVT_NO AS rsvtNo, FH.USER_NO AS userNo, PF.CMN_FACILITY_NM AS cmnFacilityNm, PF.APT_CMPLEX_NO AS aptCmplexNo, FH.RSVT_BGNG_DTTM AS rsvtBgngDttm, FH.RSVT_END_DTTM AS rsvtEndDttm, FH.RJCT_RSN_CN AS rejectReason FROM FACILITY_HSTRY FH INNER JOIN PUBLIC_ITEM PI ON FH.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO = PI.CMN_FACILITY_ITEM_NO INNER JOIN PUBLIC_FACILITY PF ON PI.CMN_FACILITY_NO = PF.CMN_FACILITY_NO WHERE FH.RSVT_NO = #{value}
